name: Spring 2026 Trend Report — Utility Dressing
why: The utility trend is speaking to me right now — relaxed cargo pants, boiler suits, officer-style shirts. It's practical but has edge. I love the idea of a Zara boiler suit styled with heels and gold jewelry for a shoot. The Buck Mason officer shirt in olive is exactly the kind of piece I'd wear with high-waisted jeans and boots. Utility feels strong and feminine at the same time.
